Specific Cost Considerations The Fund will employ strategies involving frequent trading of securities. As commissions and brokerage charges are payable per trade, the Fund may incur greater costs than a fund that trades less frequently.

Specific Risk Considerations 3 The use of financial derivative instruments for investment purposes may increase the Share price volatility, which may result in higher losses for the Investor.

The Fund may take significant positions in companies which may be concentrated in a single sector and/or geographical region. This may result in large changes in the value of the Fund, both up or down, in a short period of time which may adversely impact the performance of the Fund.
